series_metadata.series_description: These records contain the date of the request for public records, name, address, and phone # of the person making the request, the forms in which the request was received, (by phone, written or in person), the documents requested, documents of information given, records denied the requestor, if an, and by whose authority they were denied, in what form the information was given and the date of the response to the request.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area until the end of each year, then store in on-site warehouse. Retain 3 years then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
